## What does this PR change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link the related issue: e.g. "Closes #42". -->

## How was it tested?

- [ ] `npm test` (all unit + integration tests pass locally)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` (zero errors)
- [ ] `npm run build` (clean build)
- [ ] Manually exercised the affected command(s)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's [coding guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-guidelines)
- [ ] I added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] I updated the docs / README / CHANGELOG where relevant
- [ ] My commit messages follow Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, ...)
- [ ] No new emoji in source code, CLI output, or templates (per CONTRIBUTING)
